ALL TABLES

Database Tables

This is the database documentation for the Finacle eBanking 11.5 release. It describes every table and view, their columns, and their indexes. A table's primary key may be a single field or a composite of several fields.
Tables documented
Total columns
Avg. columns / table
No foreign keys exist in the physical schema — table relationships are enforced programmatically, not via DB constraints. Deleting or updating a record in a master table is automatically reflected in its child tables. Use the search bar above to jump straight to a table, column, or keyword.
